name: components/tooltip
description: A small floating overlay that displays supplementary information when a user hovers or focuses on an element. Provides a complete composition system with Tooltip, TooltipTrigger, TooltipContent, and TooltipPortal. Supports configurable open/close delays, multiple placement directions, an animated arrow, and slide-in entrance transitions. Built on Kobalte Tooltip with full ARIA tooltip role and focus management.
useCases: Icon-only action buttons that need text labels for accessibility and discoverability
Truncated table cells or headings that reveal the full text on hover
Keyboard-shortcut hints on toolbar buttons to aid power-user onboarding
Data-visualization charts where hovering a data point shows exact values and dates
usage: import { Tooltip, TooltipTrigger, TooltipContent, TooltipPortal } from "shadcn-solid-components/components/tooltip"
